metadata.name: Manage a Minimum Equipment List (MEL) Item

description: A pilot discovers a non-critical system is inoperative before a flight (e.g., a coffee maker). They must consult the MEL to see if the flight can legally depart.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot identifies the broken coffee maker.

nodes.task_description: Consult the aircraft's Minimum Equipment List (MEL) to see if dispatch is permitted with this item inoperative.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot finds the MEL entry for the coffee maker, which allows dispatch.

nodes.task_description: Follow any required procedures in the MEL (e.g., placarding the item as 'inoperative') and record the MEL item in the aircraft's technical log.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot applies the placard and makes the logbook entry, allowing the flight to depart.
